properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I thought number one Would surely be me I thought I could be what I wanted to be I thought I could build on life's sinking sand but now I can't even walk without You holding my hand

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I can't even walk without You holding my hand the mountains too high and the valleys too wide down on my knees I learned to stand Lord, I can't even walk without You holding my hand

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I thought I could do a lot on my own I thought I could make it all day long I thought of myself as a mighty big man but Lord I can't even walk without you holding my hand

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I think I'll make Jesus my all and all and if I'm in trouble on his name I'll call, if I don't trust in Him I'd be less than a man cause Lord I can't even walk without You holding my hand

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Down on my knees I learned to stand Lord I can't even walk without You holding my hands
